title: Nursery legibility and renderer phase
summary: Lane 1 should make the nursery page overlap-proof at 256x160 and extract a dedicated nursery-page renderer so the home loop reads as cleanly as the routes page.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the nursery legibility audit and renderer-split handoff.
execution_order.why_now: The home loop is now the weakest handheld surface.

execution_order.goal: Implement a dedicated nursery-page renderer plus overlap-proof state layouts.
execution_order.why_now: The nursery should read as cleanly as the routes page.

execution_order.goal: Review nursery legibility and the renderer split.
execution_order.why_now: Renderer cleanup only matters if the handheld page becomes clearly readable.

execution_order.goal: Prepare one nursery layout follow-on handoff.
execution_order.why_now: One state may still need a more compact follow-on once the renderer split lands.
The nursery should reach a reliable zero-overlap baseline before another content wave.
The nursery page should now match the routes page for shell discipline.

guardrails: Do not add another station page or dashboard seam.
Do not solve overlap through runtime truncation alone.
Keep the nursery page compact, state-based, and shell-safe.

main_271_focus.preferred_target: field-station nursery page body inside drawFieldStationOverlay
recommended_shape: Extract the whole nursery branch into a sibling helper such as src/engine/field-station-nursery-page.ts while leaving overlay-render.ts in charge of shell framing, tabs, view switching, and accent passes.
Replace the fixed bench / compost / bed stack with explicit nursery layout families for locked, ready-to-plant, active-growth, and mature states.
Let the new nursery helper own state-aware bed sub-rects so the title, body copy, route clue, memory line, and footer strip do not compete for the same vertical band.
highest_risk_states: stocked, rooting, or growing teaching-bed states when nursery.routeSupportHint is present
mature teaching-bed states with rewardSummary plus memorySummary plus the home-place footer strip
selectedProject states with no active bed, which should share the new layout system even if they are not the worst current overlap
avoid: font shrinking as the primary fix
runtime copy truncation as the primary fix
adding another station row or recap panel
broad nursery-copy rewrites that belong to lane 2

scout_272_resolution.decision: no distinct lane-1 layout follow-on is warranted after the clean renderer split review
reason: the active-growth and mature handheld proofs are now overlap-free at 256x160
the remaining live nursery pressure is copy-role alignment already owned by packet 113 in lane 2
reopen_only_if: later nursery edits reintroduce a structural overlap at 256x160
lane 2's copy-role correction still leaves one clearly layout-only failure
